title: AI Startup Funding News Today – Latest Deals & Rounds 2026
full_text:
Skip to content
Your daily source for the latest AI startup funding news. This page tracks venture capital deals across artificial intelligence as they happen, from frontier lab megarounds to early seed bets on the tools and infrastructure being built on top of them. Each deal is laid out clearly with the amount raised, funding stage, lead investors, valuation, and sector, so you can see where AI money is flowing at a glance. Updated regularly as new rounds break, it is the simplest way to stay current on who is getting funded and how much.
